data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Time-off and PTO tracking', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the implementation or functionality of this feature through API reads or state checks. This indicates a clear gap in the evidence regarding the requirement for time-off and PTO tracking.
gaps: No evidence of time-off and PTO tracking functionality being validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
